name: @feed/agent-harness
description: Training harness for wiring in and testing agents with different archetypes

scripts.lint: cd ../../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/examples/harness/package.json packages/examples/harness/tsconfig.json packages/examples/harness/README.md

scripts.lint:fix: cd ../../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome check --write --unsafe --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true --no-errors-on-unmatched packages/examples/harness/package.json packages/examples/harness/tsconfig.json packages/examples/harness/README.md
scripts.format: cd ../../.. && bunx @biomejs/biome format --write --config-path ../../biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true packages/examples/harness/package.json packages/examples/harness/tsconfig.json packages/examples/harness/README.md
